header.headline: IR Pipeline Flow
header.subtitle: A compact flow of how staged scene and model contracts become a runnable runtime.

stage_1.title: Scene + Weights
stage_1.body: Start from staged tokenizer artifacts, contracts, and initialized weights.

stage_2.title: IR1 Build
stage_2.body: Fuse the stable graph skeleton and forward structure.

stage_3.title: Lower + Layout
stage_3.body: Assign memory, lower call IR, and prepare execution-ready plans.

stage_4.title: Compile Runtime
stage_4.body: Generate C and compile the graph runtime into a shared library.

terminal.title: Runnable Runtime
terminal.body: The compiled artifact is ready for deterministic CK inference and probe evaluation.

footer.title: Transfer Check
footer.body: This case checks whether the family learns one bounded compiler-oriented board rather than one topic-specific flow.
